item.name: Dark Horse Champion's Chest Gear Coffer (IL 730)
item.description:
An extravagant chest with gaudy, overwrought ornamentation that suggests a valuable piece of attire lies within.

Required level: 100. IL: 730. Chest gear type determined by current job or class at time of opening. Cannot be opened in instanced areas such as dungeons, PvP areas, or raids.
